query: Map AZ-204 to grounded study topics and cite sources.
response: Topics: Develop Azure compute solutions (Azure Functions, App Service, Container Apps), Implement Azure security (Key Vault, Managed Identity), Connect to and consume services (API Management, Service Bus). Each cites the AZ-204 certification guide.

tool_definitions.name: foundry_iq_search
tool_definitions.description: Search the approved certification knowledge base; returns cited excerpts.

tool_definitions.name: validate_citation
tool_definitions.description: Validate a citation supports a claim.

query: Assess exam readiness for AI-102 for learner L-1013.
response: Verdict: not_ready. Estimated score below the 700 threshold; weakest area is knowledge mining. Recommendation: remediate before advancing. Sample questions are grounded in the approved AI-102 guide.

tool_definitions.name: compute_readiness_forecast
tool_definitions.description: Calibrated pass-probability + weakest topic from evidence.

tool_definitions.name: foundry_iq_search
tool_definitions.description: Search the approved certification knowledge base.

query: Critique this AZ-204 study plan and prioritise objections by exam leverage.
response: Objection (red): security is under-allocated at 2h but is 20% of the exam and the learner's weakest domain. Recommendation: raise to 4h on Key Vault and Managed Identity. Prioritised using Fabric IQ domain weights.

tool_definitions.name: fabric_iq_semantics
tool_definitions.description: Fabric IQ semantic layer: weighted domain thresholds and readiness semantics.

query: Recommend study reminder slots for a learner with high meeting load.
response: Recommended slots: Tuesday 08:00-09:30 and Thursday 08:00-09:30 (morning focus windows). Capacity risk is high due to >25 meeting hours/week; suggest protecting one recurring block. Does not write to the calendar.
